replies.msg: 理論上代謝係乜鳩fat都會照燒

Consider Cardiovascular Disease, it also depends on cholesterol, genetic factors, age, blood pressure... Increase HDL and Decrease VDL can only solve part of the problems

Statins, Niacins, and drugs maybe more useful than nuts lol
